name: Palm Beach
description: Two-mile resort strip backed by high-rise hotels — Aruba's main tourist hub. Best launch point for sunset cruises, catamaran snorkel trips, and Antilla shipwreck tours.

rockiness.beach: Groomed white sand along the resort strip 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Sandy bottom; limited reef from shore — snorkel tours go by boat

characteristics.depth_profile: Gentle sandy slope; shallow and safe for long distances. Reef snorkeling is limited from shore — most snorkel tours depart from here by boat.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Minimal on main swim areas — wide groomed sand
characteristics.crowds: busy, especially high season and near high-rise hotels
characteristics.access: Paid lots near beach center; free side-street parking a short walk away
characteristics.facilities: Extensive — restaurants, bars, jet skis, parasailing, paddleboards, tour operators
fun_facts: Two-mile resort strip backed by high-rise hotels — Aruba's main tourist hub.
Best launch point for sunset cruises, catamaran snorkel trips, and Antilla shipwreck tours.
